docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $200.00 SERVED OCT-22-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT 24 LABS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SIDNEY HAHN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 24 LABS, INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAHN, SIDNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT 24 LABS, INC. $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,775.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-22-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, SERVICE FEE: $200.00 AS TO DEFENDANT 24 LABS, INC.
